globalFindings.semanticConclusion: current app complex grammar validators are useful guardrails, but complete official grammar coverage is not proven for color, gradient, vector, string, path, regex, or numeric-list families.
globalFindings.hyprmodCompanionRole: useful metadata comparison only; not authoritative for semantic completeness
globalFindings.recommendedPolicy: Prompt 3 should inspect official source grammar by family and only then repair validator breadth or documentation.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app color parser accepts supported Hyprland color literals covered by value_color tests
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect official color parser/source for accepted literal formats, alpha handling, named colors if any, and invalid forms; then decide whether app color parser is exact, too broad, or too narrow.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app gradient parser accepts color lists plus optional angle covered by value_gradient tests
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect official gradient grammar for color-list count, angle units, separators, alpha rules, and color literal grammar inheritance.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app vector parser accepts finite vec2 components in supported space/comma forms
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect official vector parsing for comma/space delimiters, finite-only behavior, integer/float acceptance, and row-specific semantic bounds.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app validator accepts line-safe strings with row-specific policy where implemented
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect row-specific string consumers; retain line-safety but determine whether empty strings, spaces, and enum-like values need tighter policies.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app path validator accepts absolute, relative, and tilde paths while rejecting command-like or multiline values
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect source behavior for path expansion, relative paths, shader/file existence expectations, and shell-like character treatment.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app regex validator accepts line-safe regex text while rejecting config-breaking or command-like text
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect regex consumer semantics and determine whether app only needs config line-safety or should also compile/validate regex.

families.currentAppShapeSummary: app numeric-list parser accepts scroll point numeric-list shape
families.recommendedFutureAction: Inspect list grammar and bounds for numeric-list rows; parser acceptance alone is not enough for semantic completeness.
